name: FMCG & Consumer Goods Analytics
overview: Queensland’s fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector, driven by major distribution and manufacturing hubs in Crestmead and Logan, operates on relentless velocity and hyper-compressed margins. FMCG executives frequently battle siloed warehouse management systems that obscure true stock-on-hand visibility, causing catastrophic out-of-stock events during peak promotional cycles. Roar Data, headquartered in Brisbane, engineers rapid-response Power BI dashboards for QLD FMCG operations. We forcefully integrate daily point-of-sale sell-out data with upstream supplier lead times. This allows supply chain directors to surgically optimise dynamic inventory hold costs, predict seasonal demand spikes, and guarantee 'On-Time In-Full' (OTIF) delivery compliance to major retail channels.
whoIsItFor: ["Supply Chain Directors managing high-velocity FMCG distribution from Crestmead and Logan hubs.", "National Account Managers tracking major retail promotional ROI and sell-through rates across QLD.", "Demand Planners requiring predictive seasonal inventory forecasting models."]
commonProblems: ["Inability to correlate rapid retail sell-out data with incoming warehousing inventory causing severe out-of-stocks.", "Opaque supply chain logistics and demurrage costs erode paper-thin FMCG operating margins.", "Difficulty quantifying the true ROI and incremental sales lift of heavy retail promotional spend."]
useCases: ["Real-time retail sell-through velocity and predictive out-of-stock warning dashboards.", "End-to-end supply chain logistics cost and warehouse inventory hold optimisation models.", "Automated trade spend and retail promotional ROI tracking visualisations."]
kpis: ["On-Time In-Full (OTIF) Delivery Variance", "Inventory Days on Hand (DOH)", "Trade promotional Incremental Lift ROI", "Out-of-Stock (OOS) Rate Margin Impact"]
dataSources: ["SAP (FMCG Modules)", "Manhattan Associates (WMS)", "IRI / Nielsen Retail Feeds", "EDI order streams"]

metaDescription: Eliminate out-of-stocks with Brisbane's top FMCG Power BI consultancy. Real-time supply chain, inventory, and promotional ROI dashboards for QLD distributors.

name: Legal Services Analytics
overview: Brisbane’s competitive legal sector, anchored tightly within the CBD’s Queen Street and Eagle Street legal precincts, demands absolute clarity over partner profitability and billable yield. Managing partners frequently struggle to untangle disjointed practice management software, resulting in obscured write-downs, lagging matter velocity, and invisible associate utilisation bottlenecks. Roar Data, Brisbane’s elite analytics consultancy, Engineers bespoke Power BI dashboards explicitly for legal practices. We unify time-recording telemetry, work-in-progress (WIP) lock-up metrics, and client realisation rates. This provides Executive Committees with the high-density factual authority needed to compress lock-up days, enforce associate billing hygiene, and aggressively lift partner distribution yields.
whoIsItFor: ["Managing Partners overseeing multi-practice corporate law firms located in the Brisbane CBD.", "Legal Operations Directors tracking firm-wide WIP lock-up, write-downs, and matter velocity.", "Finance Directors requiring automated partner profitability and draw-down forecasting models."]
commonProblems: ["Unmonitored Work-in-Progress (WIP) lock-up severely restricts partnership cash flow distributions.", "Opaque time-recording practices hide associate under-utilisation and excessive partner write-downs.", "Inability to track actual matter profitability against initial fixed-fee client estimates."]

name: Logistics & Supply Chain Analytics
overview: Queensland’s massive logistics sector, anchored by the Port of Brisbane and sprawling distribution hubs in Yatala and Acacia Ridge, is highly sensitive to transport bottlenecks and volatile fuel overheads. Logistics executives grapple with disjointed Transport Management Systems (TMS) that obscure fleet telemetry, route inefficiencies, and exact Cost-to-Serve metrics. Roar Data, Brisbane’s elite analytics consultancy, constructs highly advanced Power BI dashboards for leading 3PL and freight operators. We integrate real-time GPS fleet tracking, warehouse throughput velocity, and financial freight reconciliation. This empowers supply chain directors to surgically eliminate empty miles, optimise cross-docking labour, and rigorously protect freight margins.
whoIsItFor: ["Supply Chain Directors managing massive 3PL and cross-docking facilities in Acacia Ridge or Yatala.", "Fleet Operations Managers directing interstate freight networks originating from the Port of Brisbane.", "Logistics Financial Controllers requiring precise Cost-to-Serve and fuel surcharge reconciliation."]

name: Transportation Analytics

Logistics and transit executives battle disconnected routing software that fails to highlight idle vehicle degradation, punitive chain-of-responsibility compliance breaches, and escalating driver fatigue risks. Roar Data, Brisbane’s premier transport analytics consultancy, deploys unyielding Power BI dashboards specific to heavy transport. We aggressively layer live GPS telematics over preventative maintenance schedules and payroll data.
